description: LFmall is an e-commerce shopping service operated under the LF brand in Korea. Its public website focuses on retail storefront functionality for browsing and purchasing products.
summary: LFmall exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp.lfmall.co.kr/mcp`; no public developer-facing HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI documentation was found on `lfmall.co.kr`.
